commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Codex app-server `before_prompt_build` input to use loaded OpenClaw session history while keeping Codex model-input and `llm_input` history empty.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +8. Total +9 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main loads mirrored session history but passes the empty Codex model-input history array into `before_prompt_build`, and the existing test currently asserts that empty hook input. I did not execute the test during this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated code repair is needed; the remaining blocker is contributor real behavior proof or a maintainer decision to accept the narrower proof for this small regression fix.

target.title: fix #88353: [Bug]: Codex before_prompt_build receives empty messages after #88262
target.body:
## Summary

- Restore Codex `before_prompt_build` hook input so plugins can observe the loaded OpenClaw session messages again.
- Keep Codex app-server model input and `llm_input` diagnostics on the native thread path without mirrored OpenClaw history.
- Add focused coverage for the hook observation contract while preserving the Codex model-input separation.

Fixes #88353

## Root Cause

- **Root cause:** The Codex app-server path reused the empty `codexModelInputHistoryMessages` array for `before_prompt_build`. That array exists to keep mirrored OpenClaw transcript history out of Codex native model input, but the hook contract is separate and should observe the already-loaded OpenClaw session messages.
- **Why this is root-cause fix:** This fixes the source contract invariant instead of masking the symptom: hook observation and Codex model input are separate channels, so `before_prompt_build` receives the loaded session messages while Codex model input and diagnostics continue to use the empty Codex-native history array.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Codex `before_prompt_build` no longer receives an empty `messages` array after session history has been loaded; the Codex native model input path still avoids injecting mirrored OpenClaw history.
- **Real environment tested:** Local Codex issue worktree at the rebased patch head, using the repository Codex Vitest wrapper and `oxfmt` with installed dependencies.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
  ```text
  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts --run --testNamePattern "applies before_prompt_build|routes Codex model input diagnostics"
  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.hooks.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.context-engine.test.ts --run --testNamePattern "before_prompt_build|llm_input|context engine|context-engine"
  pnpm exec oxfmt --threads=1 --check extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.hooks.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.context-engine.test.ts
  git diff --check
  ```
- **Evidence after fix:** Terminal capture from the focused app-server run shows the patched behavior exercised in the Codex attempt harness, with the hook assertion checking `role=assistant` and `text=previous turn`, plus the diagnostics path still using the empty Codex model-input history. Upstream Codex source was also checked in `codex-rs/app-server-protocol/src/protocol/v2/turn.rs:66-78`, `codex-rs/app-server-protocol/src/protocol/v2/thread.rs:167-172`, and `codex-rs/app-server-protocol/src/protocol/v2/thread.rs:330-338` to confirm normal `turn/start` input is current-turn input and resume history is not the normal client path.
  ```text
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
       Tests  1 passed | 84 skipped (85)

  Test Files  2 passed (2)
       Tests  25 passed | 8 skipped (33)

  Checking formatting...
  All matched files use the correct format.
  ```
- **Observed result after fix:** `extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts` now passes loaded `historyMessages` to `before_prompt_build` as hook observation data, while the Codex model input and `llm_input` diagnostics still read from the empty Codex-native history array. `extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts` observes the previous assistant turn in the hook input.
- **What was not tested:** A full repository test suite and a live external Codex app-server session were not run; this patch is covered by focused app-server behavior tests plus upstream Codex protocol source inspection.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts --run --testNamePattern "applies before_prompt_build|routes Codex model input diagnostics"`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.hooks.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.context-engine.test.ts --run --testNamePattern "before_prompt_build|llm_input|context engine|context-engine"`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --threads=1 --check extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.hooks.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.context-engine.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Regression Test Plan

- **Fix classification:** Root-cause fix for the Codex app-server hook contract regression.
- **Maintainer-ready confidence:** High for the touched contract because the patch is two production lines plus a focused regression assertion, and the Codex model-input separation remains covered by the existing diagnostics/context-engine tests.
- **Patch quality notes:** Patch quality warning reviewed: this touches a runtime contract boundary, but the change is deliberately scoped to the source invariant between hook observation and Codex model input. The implementation avoids fallback behavior and does not add new public configuration, dependency, lockfile, or cross-extension boundaries.
- **Target test file:** `extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts`
